sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَتِ الْأُمُّ الْخُضَارَ مِنَ السُّوقِ الْقَرِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je kupila povrće na obližnjoj pijaci.
sentences.translationEn: The mother bought vegetables from the nearby market.

sentences.translation: Uzela je svježi paradajz, luk i šargarepu.
sentences.translationEn: She took fresh tomatoes, onions, and carrots.

sentences.translation: Vratila se kući i počela kuhati.
sentences.translationEn: She returned home and started cooking.

sentences.translation: Miris hrane ispunio je cijelu kuću.
sentences.translationEn: The smell of the food filled the whole house.
